instructions: Read the key files to assess the current state:
- Run "npm run build" and check output for chunk sizes
- Performance (30pts): Code splitting implemented, lazy loading, manual chunks, React.memo on list items, bundle under 500KB per chunk
- Technical Debt (35pts): TypeScript strict:true enabled and compiling, error boundaries present, proper types, no any types
- UI/UX (25pts): Theme system with dark/light toggle, micro-interactions, loading states, Suspense fallbacks
- Build Health (10pts): Clean build with no errors, no warnings except chunk size
If score < target, provide a fixPlan array of specific issues to address
Return JSON: { score: number, strengths: string[], issues: string[], fixPlan: string[], ok: boolean }
prompt.role: Senior code reviewer and quality assessor
prompt.task: Review the current state of the project at C:/Users/isaha/Downloads/zip and score it out of 100.

perf.summary: Implemented code splitting, lazy loading, manual chunks, and React.memo. Main bundle reduced from 513KB to 252KB (51% reduction). 7 separate chunks created.

changes: tsconfig.json: Added strict:true and noUncheckedIndexedAccess:true
Installed @types/react and @types/react-dom as devDependencies
Fixed 29 TypeScript strict mode errors across 7 files
src/data/constants.ts: Fixed TEAM array access with non-null assertions
src/components/planner/TaskRow.tsx: Added null check for attachment preview
src/components/ui/Input.tsx: Fixed conditional class expressions
src/hooks/useWeeklyPlan.ts: Added optional chaining for array access (3 fixes)
src/lib/aiTaskDrafts.ts: Added nullish coalescing for regex match
src/lib/insforgeStorage.ts: Added default mimeType fallback
src/lib/planDnd.ts: Added optional chaining for day access
Created src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary.tsx with Turkish error UI and retry button
Wrapped TeamPanel, RemindersPanel, TaskEditModal, FilePreviewModal, AIAssistant with ErrorBoundary
techdebt.summary: Enabled TypeScript strict mode with noUncheckedIndexedAccess, fixed all 29 strict errors, installed @types/react and @types/react-dom, created ErrorBoundary component, wrapped all lazy-loaded sections with ErrorBoundary.
